block_02: Due to strict European regulation, the rates for EEA traffic have changed and the offer – IQ Option Europe will be based on a CPA model, paying up to $250 for every client who made a targeted action on the platform. Due to regulation, dynamic rates are not available in Europe anymore.
block_03: Don’t worry – if you previously worked with the Revenue share model, you will continue generating profits from your old users from IQ Option Affiliate with no changes. The CPA model will only be applicable to any new users from Europe that you bring.
block_04: We hope this change will not affect you as much and we’d love to continue seeing all the impressive affiliate work you put in !🌟
